title: Enterosora villosissima

The genus Enterosora is part of the family Polypodiaceae, which includes various species of epiphytic and terrestrial ferns. The family Polypodiaceae is a part of the order Polypodiales, which includes a diverse group of ferns. The order Polypodiales is a part of the class Polypodiopsida, which includes modern ferns.
